title: Brush Buddies Blippi Kids Toothbrushes, Manual Toothbrushes for Kids, Toothbrush for Toddlers 2-4 Years, Blippi Childrens Toothbrush, Soft Toothbrushes, 3PK
description: It’s never too early to introduce a healthy oral care routine— start with Brush Buddies Blippi Toothbrushes! Each pack includes 6 soft bristle toothbrushes with a variety of colors and designs for a fun addition to your little one’s mornings and evenings. Each children’s toothbrush features a small, rounded brush head and textured ergonomic handle for easy grip. The bristles are gentle enough to effectively clean while protecting your child’s sensitive gums and enamel.
features: [What's Included] The Brush Buddies Blippi Manual Toothbrush Pack includes 3 multi-colored Blippi kid's toothbrushes.
[Ultra-Gentle] Each soft bristle toothbrush features a rounded brush head for effective, gentle cleaning while protecting your child's delicate gums and enamel.

[Great for Toddlers] Brush Buddies Blippi Toothbrushes are a great introduction to oral care for your toddlers and young children! The small head size and ergonomic handles are ideal for little ones as they learn to brush their teeth.
[Make Brushing Fun] With bright colors and unique Blippi learning activities, the children's toothbrushes are sure to make every morning a fun and exciting routine.
[Rotate Regularly] Although dentists recommend a new toothbrush every 90 days, it's important to swap your child's toothbrush after they get sick, too!

title: Curaprox Soft Toothbrush CS 1560, 6 Pack, Colors May Vary
description: The CS 1560 Soft Toothbrush gently fights plaque and stains with the power of CUREN filaments. With densely packed and incredibly gentle bristles, the CS 1560 provides a deeper clean without damaging your gums. Tough on plaque and delicate on gums, the CS 1560 is designed for optimum oral health. The octagonal handle of the CS 1560 delivers precise manipulation to brush at every angle, with an angled brush head removes stubborn plaque and stains in hard-to-reach places. Enamel erosion and receding gum lines can be caused by vigorous scrubbing and hard brushes. To prevent this kind of damage, switch to a softer bristle like the CS 1560. CUREN bristles are gentler than typical nylon brushes for a healthier smile.
features: BRIGHTER SMILE: Transition to a softer brush and deeper clean with the CS 1560, equipped with 1,560 tightly packed 0.15 mm bristles to fight plaque and stay gentle on enamel and gums.
SOFT BRISTLES: By using CUREN filaments instead of nylon, Curaprox toothbrush bristles are incredibly fine and gentle to prevent enamel erosion.
GENTLE ON GUMS: Harsh brushing and stiff bristles can irritate your gum line. The CS 1560 cleans gently to promote gum and oral health.
ANGLED BRUSH: The angled head allows you to remove stubborn plaque and stains in hard to reach places.
STOCK UP: Available in a pack of 6 to stay stocked up year round for a healthier smile.

reviews.title: Order if you know the product!

I would recommend to anyone buying this per as the advise of a dentist and also be aware that the touch and feeling is not similar to regular ones and may take a while to get used.
So far I love this toothbrush and will keep using it forever.

title: StarWin Portable UV Toothbrush Sanitizer Travel Case UV-C LED Sterilization and Rechargeable Sterilizer Box Cleaner Holder Fits Most Electric Toothbrush Heads and Manual Toothbrushes (1 Pack)
features: ✅Sterilization Effect 99.9%: Our UV toothbrush sanitizer uses UVC-LED to kill bacteria on your toothbrush to keep your toothbrush clean and maintain good oral health.

✅Built-in Rechargeable Battery: The toothbrush sterilizer case has a built-in rechargeable battery that does not require you to purchase additional batteries. Using the USB-C charging port, it can be fully charged in about 2 hours. A full charge lasts about 15 days.

✅Easy to Use: Put the toothbrush in the toothbrush sanitizer box and close the cover, press the switch to turn on the sterilization for 3 minutes, then the toothbrush cleaner will auto turn off when finished. When sterilization open the cover toothbrush sanitizer UV light auto stop working. Designed with ventilation and drainage port, avoid toothbrushes that become moldy and harbor bacteria in an airtight, humid environment(Shake off the excess water from the toothbrush before putting it in).
✅A Good Gift: The toothbrush sanitizer and holder is made of high-quality ABS material, elegant appearance, using gift box packaging, a good choice for you to give as a gift to relatives and friends.

✅Why StarWin: We sell a wide range of professional high-quality toothbrush sanitizers for home and travel use and offer 2 months free refund and 14 months free replacement, any issues just contact the seller and we will refund or exchange it within 12 hours for you.

title: Spinbrush PRO CLEAN Battery Powered Toothbrush, Soft Bristles, 1 Count, Gold or Blue Color May Vary
description: Kiss your plaque goodbye with your NEW and improved Spinbrush PRO CLEAN Powered Toothbrush! The dual-action power toothbrush head is clinically proven to remove up to 70% more plaque in hard-to-reach places than a manual toothbrush. Soft-bristled electric brushes are ADA Accepted and proven to help reduce plaque and help prevent gingivitis. Color-Wear bristles fade over time to help remind you when it's time to replace the brush head. Keep your handle to save money and plastic with Spinbrush toothbrush brand refill packs! Handles are available in premium gold or metallic blue accent colors and may vary with purchase. Toothbrush includes two (2) replaceable AA Duracell batteries. This Spinbrush battery-powered extra soft brush cleansing toothbrush is Dentist Recommended, Not Tested on Animals, and Made Without BPA Plastics. The new, easy-to-open carton is recyclable and the tray inside (plastic #1) is made with recycled materials. Spin your way to a spotless smile with this great cleaning toothbrush! Along with this adult toothbrush, kid options and additional dental hygiene items are available.

features: Help brushing go smoothly and begin building good habits with our silicone baby finger toothbrushes.
Designed in Sweden and made of soft, food-grade silicone, they slip onto your fingertip so you can gently clean your baby's teeth without irritating gums.
Hand wash in warm water. Replace every 3-4 months.

reviews.title: LOVE THESE BABY TOOTHBRUSHES!
reviews.text: I love everything from this brand. Mushie has the best baby silicone products and I wish I had bought the other products from Amazon so that I can write these reviews! I've been skeptical about using the cotton baby toothbrushes because I don't want any lint staying in my baby's mouth or it slipping off and be a potential choking hazard. This silicone toothbrush fits perfectly on my finger and makes it so much easier to brush his teeth rather than using a toothbrush and worrying about scraping the roof of his mouth. It's soft all around and has a silicone brush side to brush and a bumpy side for better gum stimulation. It comes in a pack of two and this brand has various modern colors. I highly recommend this product for infant brushing!

reviews.title: I really like this tooth brush

I really like this tooth brush!

reviews.title: Five Stars if it suits your needs.
reviews.text:
First of all, the base color was supposed to be black and it is what they call black, but it’s kind of a copper a metallic black not a true black.
The design is compact and it works very well.
I even like the little cord holder that comes with it as it’s very ergonomically designed.
The unit works just fine for my sonicare by Phillips.
I happen to have the one with a glass. After using this a couple of days I realized I like the look of the glass better than I like this.
On the other hand, if you have a very small space in which to put it on your sink, you may prefer something with a smaller silhouette; the footprint is the same, but it’s just not as big a presence because you don’t have the height and width of the glass.

reviews.title: Just as original
reviews.text: I got this to replace mu original charger for electric toothbrush, it looks just like it and so far, it has been working as the original, would recommend.

reviews.title: Great replacement or spare charger for Sonicare
reviews.text:
I really like my Sonic Care toothbrush and take it anywhere. So getting a second charger was a no-brainer.
I chose the gold colored base and it really looks nice.

It works just like the original and comes with the clear plastic holder, but you can also use the glass cup on it if you like. The cable is nice and long and I like that it comes in black, which fits better with some décor. I think there are some choices in regard to color of the base and cable.

Nothing bad to say about them.
perfect for travel or if you have a second home and don't want to constantly take the charger with you; and of course as a replacement.

reviews.title: Great value for the money sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Great adult sonic toothbrush for a nice value. One thing to note is this vibrates rather than spins. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. Regardless, I enjoy using it. It comes with 6 replacement heads for a 18 month supply, which is pretty impressive. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. 60+ day charge. Nice black color. Easy to use & charge. Great value for the money.

Amazon will donate to your favorite charity! Use Amazon Smile (smile.amazon.com) when you order and Amazon will donate to the charity of your choice when you make a qualifying purchase. Check out how Amazon Smile works at https://smile.amazon.com/gp/chpf/about/ref=smi_se_rspo_laas_aas. My shopping is donating to my charity of choice; Unravel, at no cost to me! Unravel is a nonprofit organization working to spread knowledge about the grim realities of pediatric cancer and the devastating impact from the lack of funding. All monies raised by and for Unravel will go directly to the fight against pediatric cancer.

reviews.title: Attractive yellow color!
reviews.text: First of all, I love this bright yellow colored electric toothbrush! A refreshing change from the regular black and  white sonic electric toothbrushes that are on the market right now! The bristles are ordinary but the extra brush heads make up for it. The price is just the same like the regular sonic brushes right now so it is worth a try!

reviews.title: Strong Vibration
reviews.text: Works well with strong vibration. Timer works well with 30 seconds intervals. Brushes well with soft bristles. The only thing that I personally don't like is the slippery handle. Otherwise it is a good product. Shipping was fast.

reviews.title: The Yellow is Very Cheerful
reviews.text: This is a nice electric toothbrush for the price. It has multiple settings (clean, soft, polish, massage, and white), although I tend to leave it on white most of the time. The sunny yellow color is really quite cheerful and is a bright start to the day. The bristles are softer than others I've used, which is nice for those of us who tend to brush too hard. I really like that the brush head (and even the bristles) match the body... all in the same sunny yellow. I'm also impressed that it came with so many replacement brush heads, each with their own cover. I won't need to buy replacements for a long time! I'm pretty impressed overall.

reviews.title: Really Like It!
reviews.text: This toothbrush is sleek and powerful and I really like all of the different settings. It has a good battery life - I have only had to charge it twice so far.

reviews.text:
I bought 2 boxes of these as pencil cases for my classroom. I know that's not what they're intended for but I'm rating them on the fact that they are extremely thin plastic which makes them hard to line up and close. They are also short. I tried my toothbrush in one of them and it wouldn't close.

reviews.title: Great Value!
reviews.text: Fits my Oral B electric toothbrush. Bristle style is a little different than what I'm used to. But it cleans my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement toothbrush heads. Cant beat the price vs the comparable name brand.

reviews.title: Works fine. Medium soft.
reviews.text:
These are perfectly good replacement toothbrush heads.
They're what I would call a medium-soft bristle, which is about as soft as I like.

Minor points:
Many replacements now come with plastic hoods that snap on to protect the brush from airborne contaminates. These don't.

OEM brushes let you swap the little colored rings on the base, so you can always keep your favorite color. These don't. They have different colors, but they can't be changed.

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text:
Replacement brush heads can be so expensive. That's why I love finding value replacements online.
Nice price for the 4 brush heads. These are good for one person for a year at least.
Brushes are soft so no damaging my gums or teeth.
Works perfect with my oral b.

reviews.title: Fits my electric toothbrush
reviews.text: Just like the original except the price.With the originals price keep going up, this is a very good alternative. shipping was quick.

reviews.title: Fits perfect, soft feeling, strong
reviews.text:
I've been using OralB floss action toothbrush heads for a long time.

While these aren't floss action they clean my teeth nicely.

They fit the OralB toothbrush perfectly, actually felt a little click when I connected it.

The bristles are softer than the brush heads I've been using.

After almost a week of use they seem to be holding up well and feel very strong while using them.

At a little over $2 per head they are a pretty good deal.

reviews.title: Nice toothbrush covers!
reviews.text:
Love these toothbrush covers! The pastel colors are appealing and smooth feeling. Fits great over my electric toothbrush. A little expensive, but they’ve been worth it!

Will be buying more for replacements in the future.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Perfect for any size tooth brush we own.

reviews.title: I prefer the flip top ones after trying these; these sometimes fly out of my fingers
reviews.text:
There are six claw-type toothbrush holders in this package. The colors are muted but nice. However, after trying these, I prefer the flip top holders better because they are more streamlined, have an air vent for drying the brush, and are easier to operate.

These look nice on the brush but there is no air vent. The only air circulation is through the bottom hole through which the handle feeds through. Also, the act of opening the clip is cumbersome. Sometimes these almost want to fly out of my hand. In addition, they flop around on the top of the brush and take up more space. For instance, if I had a six-toothbrush holder and wanted to cover the top of every brush, I really could not do that successfully with these because they are top large and would be hitting into each other.

Nevertheless, these do what they are supposed to do except they are not my favorite.

The current price of $17.99 is an expensive $3 per holder.

reviews.title: Expensive for what they are, but handy and easy to use
reviews.text:
I've bought travel clips like these in the past that were similar to these. They're pretty much tiny enclosed hair clips that go over your toothbrush. These are more compact than others I've used so they're pretty secure on the toothbrush and don't move around in my toiletries bag. They may dent your brush's bristles of you have a larger brush.

There isn't much to these, they are sturdy and cute, but I do think they're pretty pricy for what they are. Granted, you do get 6 in the pack and would likely not have to repurchase them if you don't lose them.

reviews.title: Fit our electric toothbrush heads well
reviews.text: Just what they say they are. They fit our electric toothbrush heads perfectly. Easy to open and close.

title: Sonic Electric Toothbrush for Adults - 5 Powerful Cleaning & Whitening Modes with Soft Dupont Bristles, 2 Hours Quick Charge for 60 Days, IPX7 Waterproof Travel Portable Oral Dental Care Kit (Green)
features: 🦷【Smart Sonic Toothbrush】- Our electric toothbrush uses an ultra-powerful and industry-leading motor to drive the liquid between the teeth and deep into the gum line, effectively dissolving stains on the surface of the teeth. Provides superior cleaning by delivering soothing micro-pulses to improve gum health. Removes up to 10 times more plaque than a manual toothbrush, helps whiten teeth.

🦷【5 Modes Ultra Clean】- The sonic toothbrush has 5 vibration modes, clean (mild), white (strong), polish (strong inversion frequency), massage (mild inversion frequency) and sensitive (soft). You can choose stronger or lighter modes according to different oral and gum conditions. Get healthier gums, fresher breath and whiter teeth with this low-noise, lightweight sonic toothbrush.

🦷【Smart Timer Reminder】 - The electric toothbrush has a standard 2-minute brushing timer to ensure scientific brushing time. Pausing every 30 seconds to remind you to change and move on to the next brushing area, the smart toothbrush helps you develop good brushing habits. And the rechargeable toothbrush has an automatic memory function, which can record the mode used when it was turned off last time.

🦷【Large Battery Capacity, IPX7 Waterproof】- The long-life rechargeable toothbrush has a battery indicator light, has a low battery reminder and automatically cuts off the power when fully charged. The large battery capacity can be used for up to 60 days in just 2 hours with fast charging (2 times a day). The IPX7-rated fully sealed charging port is more secure and waterproof, and can be used in bathtubs and showers.

🦷【Gift Box Packaging Included】- Our electric toothbrush comes in a premium gift box packag. Includes 1 Sonic Electric Toothbrush, 2 DuPont Brush Heads, 1 Charging Cable, 1 Travel Case for Electric Toothbrush Handle and Brush Heads. You can also find detailed instructions and a support contact manual. Perfect as a gift for your family and friends.
🦷We provide you with 1 year warranty service. If you have any questions, please contact us first, we will provide you with satisfactory customer service within 24 hours.

reviews.title: Brush your teeth
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:3fb7df8324b736c48355f08468ae1f62]] You’ve got to brush those teeth. Make them all squeaky clean !

This seems like a standard electric toothbrush

I like the design and think it looks nice

It has a good feel to it overall and i thought the different settings were nice

reviews.title: Superior Brushing Experience
reviews.text: This electric toothbrush is the best I've ever used. It charged quickly and lasts. It is comfortable in my hands through the entire brushing process. It has average buzzing sound. There are multiple intensities of bruising power for different parts of my mouth. My teeth went from obvious coffee drinker to noticeably whiter and healthier. The bristles are gentle regardless of which setting I used. The narrow head allows me to easily brush my back teeth and gums.

reviews.title: Absolutly love this color

reviews.title: Clean Teeth &Gums
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are designed to clean teeth while simultaneous removing plaque from the gum line. The outer bristles angle out. I found the brush to be effective. The bristles are gentle. I have sensitive gums and they were not irritated or sore after use. Good brush.

reviews.title: Very wide
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. It is quite unusual. It is very, very wide. Make sure you see how much. I don't think I've ever seen one this wide. How it works for you is just going to depend on whether you like that. You can get a lot more at the same time, but some people may find it uncomfortable, especially if you have a small mouth. But it is a way to be very efficient and get a lot of areas. It feels well made. It seems like a quality brush.

reviews.title: Very wide
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. It is quite unusual. It is very, very wide. Make sure you see how much. I don't think I've ever seen one this wide. How it works for you is just going to depend on whether you like that. You can get a lot more at the same time, but some people may find it uncomfortable, especially if you have a small mouth. But it is a way to be very efficient and get a lot of areas. It feels well made. It seems like a quality brush.

reviews.title: Nothing fancy but does the job.
reviews.text: Toothbrushes are necessary and seem to be the one thing that I forget to purchase when I go to the store. So, ordering these Ooak toothbrushes was a no-brainer. These are not fancy. They are traditional toothbrushes that leave your teeth feeling smooth and clean (grit free). There are five rows of soft bristles…the three rows in the center are straight and the outside (colored) ones are slightly angled. The colors of the brushes are neutral, white and orange. The rubber grip handle makes it easy to grip and hold. And finally, on Amazon this two pack is under $7, which is reasonable when compared to other two packs on the market. I’d recommend these.

reviews.title: A unique set of toothbrushes
reviews.text: This toothbrush set has been designed in a V design for the bristles - which means that it looks different than other toothbrushes. The bristles have a lot of space to get in the gum line, in between teeth and works well. I got the medium bristles which are fine with me. I don't want too hard of a bristle, as that is not recommended by the dentist. This does a decent job cleaning.
